summary: Excellent high‑level audience recording that captures a superb spring night at the Rose, ranked among top‑5 favorites
review: The reviewer praises this Sennheiser audience tape as one of their all‑time favourite recordings, noting its clarity and richness—so good it outshines many soundboard mixes. While no specific songs are called out, the overall performance is described as “awesome,” indicating a highly enjoyable show.

ai_rating.rationale: Single 5‑star review highlights both stellar recording quality and an excellent concert experience, but limited data prevents higher confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Sennheiser rig captured high‑level audience sound; reviewer says it surpasses typical mixing‑desk recordings in overall quality.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No detailed set‑list commentary, but the concert is described as an ‘awesome’ spring night performance.
